meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Project Template to Solve Project Stalls
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS build. Master the Antigravity project template and leverage Claude Code to launch your MVP faster. Expert-led guide for founders.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates decision fatigue by providing a battle-tested, production-ready SaaS architecture. By pairing this framework with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate, enforce strict modularity, and maintain high velocity, ensuring your MVP transitions from a stagnant repository to a revenue-generating platform in record time.
content.intro:
You have the vision, the domain expertise, and the fire to disrupt your market. Yet, you find yourself trapped in the 'Infinite Prototype Loop'—endless configuration, dependency hell, and the sinking feeling that your product will never see the light of day. It is the silent killer of 90% of SaaS startups: the inability to cross the chasm from local development to a live, monetizable environment.

Relief has arrived. The Antigravity project template isn't just code; it's a structural blueprint designed to force shipping. By decoupling your business logic from the infrastructure, we strip away the technical friction that keeps you stuck. It is time to stop tinkering and start building a product that people actually pay for.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Start with a clean, production-hardened environment that handles authentication, database connections, and API routing out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity standard template with Supabase integration and Stripe billing modules.

steps.title: Define Core Business Logic
steps.description: Translate your value proposition into actionable modules before writing a single line of UI code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my core business requirement: [Insert Idea]. Generate the necessary service layer, database schema, and API endpoints for this logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate the backend service layer for the business requirements defined in the schema.md file.'

steps.title: Automate Endpoint Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to bridge your business logic with the Antigravity template, ensuring type safety and clean architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Connect the newly created services to the Antigravity API routes. Ensure all inputs are validated using Zod.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate API controllers for the new modules and link them to the main router.'

steps.title: Build the User-Facing MVP
steps.description: Focus on the 'Happy Path'—the specific sequence of actions a user takes to pay you money.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create the front-end components for the primary workflow. Use the Antigravity UI library for consistent, accessible styling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate the React components for the primary onboarding flow using the existing design system.'

steps.title: Production Deployment Readiness
steps.description: Audit your code for security and performance bottlenecks before the first user login.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a production-readiness audit on the codebase. Identify any missing environment variables, security risks, or performance bottlenecks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Audit the codebase for production readiness and generate a deployment checklist.'

pro_tips: Never hardcode environment variables; use the Antigravity .env.example pattern to maintain parity across dev, staging, and production.
Use Claude Code to write your integration tests first; if your tests pass, your feature is by definition complete.
Treat your database schema as the source of truth; sync your types automatically using the Antigravity CLI to prevent runtime errors.
Prioritize shipping the Stripe integration over complex UI animations; revenue validation is the only metric that matters at the MVP stage.
If you get stuck for more than 30 minutes, use Claude Code to refactor your current module rather than debugging line-by-line.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, immediately set up a feedback loop by integrating a tool like PostHog to track user conversion, then iterate based on actual usage data rather than assumptions.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the blueprint, and the expertise. The only variable left is your action. Stop building in the dark and start building a business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
